message:
test(bd-1bss): add unit tests for lib.rs utility functions

Cover parse_params, parse_params_or_default, request_id_to_u64,
stable_hash_request_id, RequestCompletion lifecycle, DuplicateBehavior
derive traits, LoggingConfig defaults, LifespanHooks, log_level_rank
ordering, and ActiveRequestGuard RAII cleanup. 24 new tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
